criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance the shopping experience, such as personalized recommendations, virtual try-ons, or chatbots.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, official websites, user reviews

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall ease of use, interface design, and user satisfaction with the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app ratings, usability studies

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and usefulness of features offered by the app, including search capabilities, payment options, and customer support.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, feature lists, user reviews

criteria.name: Market Presence
criteria.description: The popularity and user base of the app, indicating its reach and acceptance in the market.
criteria.sources: Download statistics, user reviews, industry reports

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: The app's introduction of new and unique features that set it apart from competitors.
criteria.sources: App updates, press releases, industry analyses
